title: hemionitis bolborrhiza
intro: Hemionitis bolborrhiza, also known as the rheumatism fern, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are commonly used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Hemionitis bolborrhiza include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared by making tea from its leaves, or by using it in combination with other herbs in tonics and infusions.
